# HPD.ML.Core.Schema

- Package: `HPD-ML-Core` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Core`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Core`
- Kind: `class`
- Guide: [Related documentation](../../../concepts/schemas-and-field-types.md)
